description_long: This object is a round apple with a predominantly red and orange mottled skin, featuring subtle yellow and brown undertones. The surface is slightly glossy, with a natural, uneven coloration and some visible textural variation typical of apple skin. At the top, a short, cylindrical brown stem protrudes from a shallow dimple. One side of the apple is cut away, revealing a pale yellow, fibrous interior with a smooth, moist appearance. The cut surface is flat and clean, contrasting with the textured, multicolored exterior. The apple appears fresh and intact, with no visible stickers or blemishes.
description: A round, red-orange apple with a short brown stem and a flat cut side exposing its pale yellow interior.
description_view_0: Shows the apple's cut side, revealing the pale yellow interior and the brown stem on top.
description_view_1: Displays the uncut, rounded side with mottled red and orange skin and the stem visible at the top.
description_view_2: Presents another rounded side, similar to view 1, with a focus on the apple's natural skin texture.
description_view_3: Highlights the apple's curved surface and stem, with no cut side visible.
